name: elegy-opencode-workers
description: CLI-first supervised read-only OpenCode workers for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate read-only worker jobs to OpenCode through a bundled CLI.
interface.longDescription: Launch supervised OpenCode ACP workers for exploration, research, review, and validation through a bundled CLI while Codex keeps authority over edits and final evidence. MCP is available only as an optional projection.
defaultPrompt: Run the bundled OpenCode Workers CLI for a read-only review.
Check recent OpenCode worker results through the CLI.
Review OpenCode worker usage and cost evidence.
